brief.headline: On Wavelength
brief.tagline: Group calendar with heatmap voting plus a sport-coach workflow for 8 sports.
brief.what_it_is: On Wavelength is a calendar app for iOS and Android with a feature that does not exist cleanly anywhere else: heatmap voting for group dates. Everyone in the circle taps their available times, the app computes the best shared slot, no "when works for you" ping-pong in the group chat. The second pillar is a full sport-coach workflow for 8 sports (soccer, volleyball, basketball, handball, hockey, badminton, tennis, running): plan trainings + matches, manage lineups, track live attendance, browse a drill library.
brief.who_for: Two distinct audiences. Audience A: amateur sport coaches across the 8 sports above plus run clubs (highest converter, 3-5% reel-views to install). Audience B: flatshares, friend groups, families and productivity-curious creators with a real group-coordination problem (broader reach, ~0.5-1% conversion). Creators who sit well: garage-coach build-in-public, study-with-me reels, flatshare lifestyle accounts, drill-library TikTokers.
features: Heatmap voting: every member taps their available times, the app shows the best shared slot per week without group-chat back-and-forth.
Group calendar with colour-coded members and shared events (cooking, cleaning, brunch, game night).
Sport-team management: plan trainings + matches + lineups, track live attendance, push session reminders.
Drill library: searchable collection across all 8 sports, combine drills into a session in 4 minutes.
Season planner: enter matches once, duplicate trainings, import the player list, planning a full season in 20 minutes.
Multi-group support: a coach with several teams plus a private flatshare circle in one app, no profile switching.
business_model_lines: Single revenue stream: recurring Premium subscription.
Pricing: ~5 EUR / month or ~40 EUR / year (ASC live, May 2026).
Free tier: full heatmap voting, single calendar, one small group up to 4 members.
Premium unlocks: unlimited groups, sport-team workspace, drill library, live attendance, season planner.
brief.why_this_works: Sport coaches have an everyday pain (no-shows, lineup chaos, drill planning) and convert above average. A single coach brings 8-16 active users on average, so coach attribution compounds. The productivity / flatshare audience converts weaker but reach is much larger, which keeps the funnel filled between coach campaigns. Heatmap voting is the demo-able "only-here" feature that always pulls in screen-recording content.

en.subtitle: for creators who plan together (sport coach, flatshare, productivity)
en.hero_quote: Plan smarter, together. Earn from what you share anyway.
en.sixty_seconds_intro: On Wavelength is an iOS + Android calendar app with two pillars: heatmap voting for group dates (everyone taps when they are free, the app picks the best slot, group chat stays quiet) and a full sport-coach workflow for 8 sports (soccer, volleyball, basketball, handball, hockey, badminton, tennis, running) covering trainings, matches, lineups, live attendance and a drill library.
en.why_this_works: "When works for you?" group chats die quietly. Coaches lose 5 min per session asking "who is not here?". Wavelength replaces both with one tap.
free_vs_premium: Free: heatmap voting on 1 group up to 4 members, single calendar.
Premium (~5 EUR/m or ~40 EUR/y): unlimited groups, sport-team workspace (drills, lineups, attendance), season planner.
Free Lifetime Premium for onboarded affiliates (no posting obligation).
audience_fit_good: Amateur sport coaches across the 8 sports + run-club coaches.
Productivity / calendar creators with a group-coordination angle.
audience_fit_poor: Solo productivity (Notion-template accounts) — Wavelength is a group tool.
reel_hooks_sport: "Stop wasting your warmup yelling 'who is not here'" — live attendance demo, 3 players tap-tap-tap.
"How I plan a full season in 20 minutes" — screen-rec: enter matches, duplicate trainings, import player list.
"The drill library that saved my Tuesday trainings" — flip through the drill library, build a session in 4 minutes.
"POV: you are the coach with the group chat from hell" — comedic 50-notification chaos, smash-cut to heatmap.
"This replaced my whiteboard" — before/after, lineup editor from the bus.
reel_hooks_productivity: "The one app my flat actually uses" — show the weekly plan with colour-coded roommates.
"How we finally find dates as a flatshare" — six screenshots step-by-step.
"5 apps that saved my coaching season" — Wavelength on slide 1, no hard sell.
story_ideas: Education story: heatmap screenshot + sticker "THE feature I need most" + link sticker.
Social proof: team selfie after training, caption "we plan all our sessions here", @onwavelength tag.
Direct ask: selfie mode, "use my link for 1 month free Premium" (lifetime Premium for you, 1-month trial for your audience).
carousel_ideas: "5 apps that saved my coaching season" (Wavelength on slide 1, no hard sell).
"How we finally find dates as a flatshare" (step-by-step screenshots, slide 6 = affiliate link in caption).
"Tools every amateur coach needs" (Wavelength + 4 generic tools, you as the trusted voice).
en.posting_cadence: Sport-coach audience: highest engagement Tue + Thu 7-9pm CET (post-training, pre-bed scroll). Sat morning for match-day content. Productivity audience: Mon + Wed 8-10am CET or Sun evening 6-8pm "plan-the-week" mood. Frequency: 1 reel per week is enough for affiliate conversion. 1 story on top with link sticker brings 30-50% of conversions empirically.
en.conversion_math: 50% revenue share, 24 months per attributed user. Premium ~5 EUR/m or ~40 EUR/y. Example sport-coach reel (50k followers): 30,000 views x 1.2% CTR = 360 clicks, 40% install = 144 installs, 5% convert to Premium = 7 subs, ~300-400 EUR over 12-24 months from one reel. Example productivity reel (100k followers): 60,000 views x 1.5% CTR = 900 clicks, 35% install = 315 installs, 4% convert = 12 subs, ~360-450 EUR over 12 months. Example drill TikToker (250k): 180,000 views x 0.8% CTR = 1,440 clicks, 30% install = 432 installs, 6% convert = 26 subs, ~1,500 EUR over 12 months from ONE reel.
tracking_model_lines: Your link onwavelength.space/i/[yourhandle] works on any platform (IG bio, TikTok bio, story sticker, video description).
Person taps link: we log click + source.

Person installs: Android uses Google install-referrer (deterministic), iOS warm install uses Universal Link (deterministic), iOS cold install (~99% of influencer traffic) uses a signed-token clipboard deferred-deeplink — proven functional, live verified, no Branch.io.
Person subscribes to Premium: 50% of net revenue (after Apple/Google cut) is credited to your handle for 24 months from that user's first paid month.
30-day refund holdback before any payout becomes claimable (Apple/Google refund window protection).
onboarding_steps: Click the personal link from Mail 2 (valid 7 days).
Fill in: display name + handle, Wise payout details, country (for tax docs), billing address.
Get your personal tracking link by mail + dashboard unlock.
Free Lifetime Premium activation code mailed to you. No posting obligation, no expiry.
dashboard_lines: Per day / week / month: clicks, installs (Android / iOS-warm / iOS-cold split), active Premium subs from your bucket.
Claimable EUR + paid EUR + next payout date.
Refund holdback pipeline + per-app earnings funnel.
en.brand_assets: Logo, app screenshots, B-roll footage, colour palette and ready-made caption snippets: getklar.org/i/wavelength/brand-assets (link goes live with your onboarding mail).
faq: What if I want Free Lifetime Premium but do not want to post?
Fine. Premium is sent anyway. We never market in your name. Your link stays ready whenever you decide to post.
Can I use the link in multiple posts?
Yes. It is YOUR link, for 24 months per conversion. More posts = more conversions = more payout. No volume cap.
What if I lose interest after 6 months?
We let it rest. Subs that came in during those 6 months continue to be paid out until each user reaches the 24-month mark.
Can I negotiate a flat fee on top?
Yes. Mid-tier creators $150-800 per post, macros $800+ (DACH CPMs lower). Rev-share stays on top. Reply to discuss.
What happens if Premium pricing changes?
You continue to earn 50% on the then-current price. If we raise from 5 EUR to 7 EUR, you get 50% of 7 EUR.
Disclosure duty?
Yes, rev-share counts as a paid recommendation. Use #ad / #sponsored / IG "Paid Partnership". Otherwise warning-letter risk for you and us (FTC + EU law).

de.subtitle: für Creator die zusammen planen (Sport-Coach, WG, Produktivität)
de.hero_quote: Smarter zusammen planen. Verdien an dem was du eh schon teilst.
de.sixty_seconds_intro: On Wavelength ist eine iOS + Android Kalender-App mit zwei Säulen: Heatmap-Voting für Gruppen-Termine (jeder tippt seine freien Zeiten, App pickt den besten Slot, Gruppen-Chat bleibt still) und ein voller Sport-Coach-Workflow für 8 Sportarten (Fußball, Volleyball, Basketball, Handball, Hockey, Badminton, Tennis, Laufen) mit Trainings, Matches, Aufstellungen, Live-Anwesenheit und Drill-Bibliothek.
de.why_this_works: "Wann passt's bei dir?"-Gruppen-Chats sterben leise. Coaches verlieren 5 min pro Session mit "wer ist heute nicht da?". Wavelength ersetzt beides mit einem Tap.
free_vs_premium: Free: Heatmap-Voting auf 1 Gruppe bis 4 Mitglieder, ein einzelner Kalender.
Premium (~5 EUR/Monat oder ~40 EUR/Jahr): unbegrenzt Gruppen, Sport-Team-Workspace (Drills, Aufstellungen, Anwesenheit), Saison-Planer.
Free Lifetime Premium für onboarded Affiliates (kein Posting-Zwang).
reel_hooks_sport: "Stop deine Warmup mit 'wer ist nicht da?' zu verschwenden" — Live-Anwesenheit-Demo, 3 Spieler tap-tap-tap.
"Wie ich eine ganze Saison in 20 Minuten plane" — Screen-Rec: Matches eintragen, Trainings duplizieren, Spielerliste importieren.
"Die Drill-Bibliothek die meine Dienstags-Trainings gerettet hat" — durch die Drill-Bibliothek scrollen, Session in 4 Minuten zusammenbauen.
"POV: du bist der Coach mit dem Gruppen-Chat aus der Hölle" — Comedy-Take mit 50 Notifications, Cut zu Heatmap.
"Das hat mein Whiteboard ersetzt" — Vorher/Nachher, Aufstellungs-Editor aus dem Bus.
reel_hooks_produktivity: "Die eine App die meine WG tatsächlich nutzt" — Wochenplan mit farbcodierten Mitbewohnern.
"Wie wir endlich Termine als WG finden" — sechs Screenshots step-by-step.
"5 Apps die meine Coaching-Saison gerettet haben" — Wavelength auf Slide 1, kein Hard-Sell.
story_ideas: Education-Story: Heatmap-Screenshot + Sticker "DAS Feature das ich am meisten brauche" + Link-Sticker.
Social-Proof: Team-Selfie nach Training, Caption "wir planen all unsere Sessions hier", @onwavelength taggen.
Direct-Ask: Selfie-Mode, "nutz meinen Link für 1 Monat Premium gratis" (Lifetime Premium für dich, 1-Monat-Trial für deine Audience).
carousel_ideas: "5 Apps die meine Coaching-Saison gerettet haben" (Wavelength Slide 1, kein Hard-Sell).
"Wie wir endlich Termine als WG finden" (Step-by-step Screenshots, Slide 6 = Affiliate-Link in Caption).
"Tools die jeder Amateur-Coach braucht" (Wavelength + 4 generische Tools, du als Trusted Voice).
de.posting_cadence: Sport-Coach-Audience: höchstes Engagement Di + Do 19-21h MEZ (nach-Training, vor-Bett-Scroll). Samstag morgen für Match-Day-Content. Produktivitäts-Audience: Mo + Mi 8-10h MEZ oder Sonntag-Abend 18-20h "plan-die-Woche"-Mood. Frequenz: 1 Reel pro Woche reicht für Affiliate-Conversion. 1 Story oben mit Link-Sticker bringt empirisch 30-50% der Conversions.
de.conversion_math: 50% Revenue-Share, 24 Monate pro attribuiertem User. Premium ~5 EUR/m oder ~40 EUR/y. Beispiel Sport-Coach-Reel (50k Follower): 30,000 Views x 1,2% CTR = 360 Clicks, 40% Install = 144 Installs, 5% Premium-Conversion = 7 Subs, ~300-400 EUR über 12-24 Monate aus einem Reel. Beispiel Produktivitäts-Reel (100k Follower): 60,000 Views x 1,5% CTR = 900 Clicks, 35% Install = 315 Installs, 4% Conversion = 12 Subs, ~360-450 EUR über 12 Monate. Beispiel Drill-TikToker (250k): 180,000 Views x 0,8% CTR = 1,440 Clicks, 30% Install = 432 Installs, 6% Conversion = 26 Subs, ~1,500 EUR über 12 Monate aus EINEM Reel.
tracking_model_lines: Dein Link onwavelength.space/i/[handle] funktioniert auf jeder Plattform (IG-Bio, TikTok-Bio, Story-Sticker, Video-Description).
Person tippt den Link: wir loggen Click + Source.

Person installiert: Android nutzt Google Install-Referrer (deterministisch), iOS-warm nutzt Universal-Link (deterministisch), iOS-cold (~99% des Influencer-Traffic) nutzt signed-Token Clipboard-Deferred-Deeplink — bewiesen funktional, live verifiziert, kein Branch.io nötig.
Person abonniert Premium: 50% des Netto-Umsatzes (nach Apple-/Google-Cut) wird deinem Handle gutgeschrieben, 24 Monate ab dem ersten bezahlten Monat dieses Users.
30 Tage Refund-Holdback bevor irgendwas claimable wird (Apple-/Google-Refund-Fenster-Schutz).
onboarding_steps: Klick den persönlichen Link aus Mail 2 (7 Tage gültig).
Du füllst aus: Display-Name + Handle, Wise-Payout-Details, Land (Steuer-Dokumente), Rechnungsadresse.
Du bekommst deinen persönlichen Tracking-Link per Mail + Dashboard-Zugang.
Free Lifetime Premium Activation-Code per Mail. Kein Posting-Zwang, kein Ablauf.
dashboard_lines: Pro Tag / Woche / Monat: Clicks, Installs (Android / iOS-warm / iOS-cold getrennt), aktive Premium-Subs aus deinem Bucket.
Claimable EUR + Paid EUR + nächstes Payout-Datum.
de.brand_assets: Logo, App-Screenshots, B-Roll-Footage, Farbpalette und fertige Caption-Snippets: getklar.org/i/wavelength/brand-assets (Link wird mit deinem Onboarding-Mail aktiv).
faq: Was wenn ich Free Lifetime Premium will, aber nichts posten?
Passt. Premium kommt trotzdem. Wir vermarkten nicht in deinem Namen. Dein Link bleibt verfügbar falls du später doch posten willst.
Kann ich den Link in mehreren Posts nutzen?
Ja. Es ist DEIN Link, für 24 Monate pro Conversion. Mehr Posts = mehr Conversions = mehr Payout. Kein Volume-Cap.
Was wenn ich nach 6 Monaten das Interesse verliere?
Wir lassen es ruhen. Subs die in den 6 Monaten reinkamen werden weiterhin ausgezahlt bis jeder User seine 24 Monate erreicht.
Kann ich eine Flat-Fee on-top verhandeln?
Ja. Mid-Tier-Creator 150-800 EUR pro Post, Macros 800+ (DACH-CPMs niedriger). Rev-Share bleibt obendrauf. Per Reply diskutieren.
Was wenn sich Premium-Pricing ändert?
Du verdienst weiter 50% auf den jeweils aktuellen Preis. Wenn wir von 5 EUR auf 7 EUR erhöhen, bekommst du 50% von 7 EUR.
Kennzeichnungspflicht?
Ja, Rev-Share zählt als bezahlte Empfehlung. Nutze #ad / #Werbung / IG "Paid Partnership". Sonst Abmahn-Risiko für dich und uns (UWG, FTC).
